channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Redacted FBI records reveal pre-attack emails between Trump shooter and law enforcement, raising questions
item.description: Recently released FBI records, though heavily redacted, show that Thomas Crooks—the individual who attempted to assassinate Donald Trump on July 13, 2024—had prior email contact with a sheriff’s deput...

item.title: CJP Protest at Jantar Mantar Targets Exam Leak Allegations; BJP Responds with Indirect Criticism
item.description: Hundreds of people gathered at Delhi's Jantar Mantar on 6 June 2026 to participate in a protest organised by the satirical political group Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). The demonstration demanded the r...

item.title: Ida Odinga Talks to Maurice Ogeta During Gor Mahia Trophy Visit
item.description: Kenya's Ambassador to UNEP, Ida Odinga, had a light-hearted but firm chat with Maurice Ogeta when he visited the Odinga family home in Karen on Monday, June 1. Ogeta, who once served as a bodyguard to...

item.title: California GOP Official Publicly Refutes False Election Claims
item.description: Elizabeth Barcohana, a Republican operative in Los Angeles, went viral after publicly debunking a right-wing election conspiracy involving the LA mayoral race. Rasmussen Reports had claimed that a sin...

item.title: Environment Canada Issues Tornado Alerts for Areas of Southeastern Saskatchewan Amid Severe Weather Risk
item.description: Parts of southeastern Saskatchewan were placed under tornado alerts on June 6, 2026, as weather authorities warned residents about conditions favourable for the development of severe thunderstorms cap...

item.title: FBI records reveal prior contact and investigation details on Thomas Crooks, Trump shooter
item.description: FBI documents obtained through a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit have revealed previously undisclosed information about Thomas Matthew Crooks, the gunman who wounded former President Donald Trump d...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party holds first protest in Delhi over examination irregularities
item.description: NEW DELHI: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), led by founder Abhijeet Dipke, held its first public protest in Delhi on Saturday following online satirical responses to comments attributed to the Chief J...

item.title: Behind the Scenes with Sophia Loren on the Set of 'The Miller’s Beautiful Wife' (1955)
item.description: In 1955, Sophia Loren, at only 21 years old, was already exhibiting the remarkable beauty and charisma that would eventually make her a global film icon. During the filming of the Italian comedy 'The ...

item.title: Google Enhances Pixel Voicemail with Custom Greeting Features and Smarter Controls
item.description: Google continues to refine the voicemail experience on its Pixel devices, turning what was once a basic carrier-dependent feature into a more modern, customizable tool. According to reports, a new “Ta...

item.title: Steve Hilton and Xavier Becerra Lead California Governor Primary Early Results
item.description: In the early results of California's gubernatorial primary, Republican Steve Hilton, a former Fox News host, and Democrat Xavier Becerra, a former health secretary, are leading a crowded field of cand...

item.title: Trump posts AI-generated videos about himself on D-Day, ignoring historical remembrance
item.description: On June 6, 2026, the 82nd anniversary of D-Day, former President Donald Trump faced criticism for posting AI-generated videos on Truth Social glorifying himself, without acknowledging the historical s...

item.title: New York Knicks Implement Early Arrival for Fans Due to Enhanced Security for Presidential Attendance
item.description: The New York Knicks announced that fans attending Game 3 of the 2026 NBA Finals should arrive at Madison Square Garden at least two hours before tip-off. This measure is being implemented to accommoda...

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene travels to Mexico for experimental stem cell therapy
item.description: Former Georgia Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene recently traveled to Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, to receive stem cell treatments that have not been approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (...

item.title: Stephen Miller Criticized Online for Opposition to Judicial Oversight of Surveillance
item.description: Stephen Miller, former Homeland Security Advisor, faced widespread criticism online after voicing his opposition to proposed checks on U.S. surveillance powers. Lawmakers have suggested that federal l...

item.title: Analysis of ‘Plein Soleil’: Alain Delon’s Defining Portrayal of Tom Ripley
item.description: Rene Clement’s 1960 film 'Plein Soleil' (Purple Noon) remains one of the most celebrated adaptations of Patricia Highsmith’s thriller 'The Talented Mr Ripley'. The movie introduced Alain Delon as Tom ...

item.title: Rafael Poch Warns of Escalating Russia-West Tensions and the Risks of Wider Global Conflict
item.description: In an interview with Diario Red, journalist and former Moscow correspondent Rafael Poch discusses growing tensions between Russia and Europe, arguing that Western policies have contributed to a danger...

item.title: Quebec Liberals Position Themselves as the Federalist Choice Ahead of Election
item.description: Quebec Liberal Leader Charles Milliard is presenting his party as the only clearly federalist option in the province as it heads toward the upcoming general election in October. Speaking at the party ...

item.title: Ottawa authorities investigate coyote attack on local resident
item.description: The City of Ottawa is currently investigating an incident in which a person was reportedly injured by a coyote. Local authorities have not yet released full details regarding the circumstances of the ...

item.title: Trump Shares AI-Generated Posts Targeting Judge Richard Leon, Rosie O'Donnell, and Barack Obama
item.description: President Donald Trump used his Truth Social platform to publish a series of AI-generated images and messages aimed at several political and public figures. The most significant post focused on U.S. D...

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo announced as surprise performer at Primavera Sound Barcelona
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo has been confirmed as a surprise performer at Primavera Sound in Barcelona, appearing on the festival’s penultimate day at Parc del Fòrum. The announcement was first teased via the fest...
